name: Org Chart Microsite
description: A password-protected, interactive, editable stakeholder org chart. Drag to reposition, add/edit people in the browser, switch between horizontal, vertical, concentric, and network layouts.

SITE_PASSWORD.description: Password visitors must enter to view the site. Pick something memorable to share with your team.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign login sessions. A random value is fine; leave as-is to auto-generate.

SITE_TITLE.description: Title shown in the header and browser tab.

SITE_LOCKUP.description: URL of a logo image to show in the header (optional). Leave blank for none.
